insight.message: Identity vector risks have increased by 14% this week. Recommendation: Audit all service accounts with SPNs and enforce AES encryption for Kerberos tickets to mitigate Roasting techniques.

critical.title: Golden Ticket
critical.description: Forged Kerberos TGT using krbtgt hash enables persistent domain-wide access and bypasses normal authentication controls.

critical.title: Silver Ticket
critical.description: Forged Kerberos service tickets for specific SPNs allow lateral movement without contacting the domain controller.

critical.title: DCSync Attack
critical.description: Replication API abuse to dump password hashes from AD — equivalent to compromising the domain controller.

high.title: OS Dumping: NTDS
high.description: Extraction of NTDS.dit database for offline credential cracking and golden ticket material.

high.title: OS Dumping: LSASS
high.description: Memory dump of LSASS process to harvest credentials and Kerberos tickets from live sessions.

high.title: Kerberoasting
high.description: Offline cracking of Kerberos service tickets for accounts with weak SPN passwords.

high.title: AS-REP Roasting
high.description: Abuse of accounts without Kerberos pre-authentication to obtain crackable AS-REP hashes.

high.title: Pass the Hash
high.description: NTLM hash reuse for lateral movement without recovering plaintext passwords.

high.title: Adversary-in-the-Middle
high.description: Interception or relay of authentication traffic to capture or relay credentials.
